args.code:
import pandas as pd

opps = env['data_2']
opp_items = env['data_3']

df_opps = pd.DataFrame(opps)
df_opps['Id'] = df_opps['Id'].str.replace('#', '').str.strip()

df_items = pd.DataFrame(opp_items)
df_items['OpportunityId'] = df_items['OpportunityId'].str.replace('#', '').str.strip()
df_items['Product2Id'] = df_items['Product2Id'].str.replace('#', '').str.strip()

df = pd.merge(df_opps, df_items, left_on='Id', right_on='OpportunityId')
print(df[['Id', 'CloseDate', 'StageName', 'Product2Id']])

import pandas as pd

opps = env['data_2']
opp_items = env['data_3']

df_opps = pd.DataFrame(opps)
df_opps['Id'] = df_opps['Id'].str.replace('#', '').str.strip()

df_items = pd.DataFrame(opp_items)
df_items['OpportunityId'] = df_items['OpportunityId'].str.replace('#', '').str.strip()
df_items['Product2Id'] = df_items['Product2Id'].str.replace('#', '').str.strip()

df = pd.merge(df_opps, df_items, left_on='Id', right_on='OpportunityId')

products = env['data_4']
df_products = pd.DataFrame(products)
df_products['Id'] = df_products['Id'].str.replace('#', '').str.strip()

df_merged = pd.merge(df, df_products, left_on='Product2Id', right_on='Id', suffixes=('_opp', '_prod'))

print(df_merged[['Id_opp', 'CloseDate', 'StageName', 'Product2Id', 'Name', 'Description']])

args.code:
import pandas as pd

opps = env['data_2']
opp_items = env['data_3']

df_opps = pd.DataFrame(opps)
df_opps['Id'] = df_opps['Id'].str.replace('#', '').str.strip()

df_items = pd.DataFrame(opp_items)
df_items['OpportunityId'] = df_items['OpportunityId'].str.replace('#', '').str.strip()
df_items['Product2Id'] = df_items['Product2Id'].str.replace('#', '').str.strip()

df = pd.merge(df_opps, df_items, left_on='Id', right_on='OpportunityId')

products = env['data_4']
df_products = pd.DataFrame(products)
df_products['Id'] = df_products['Id'].str.replace('#', '').str.strip()

df_merged = pd.merge(df, df_products, left_on='Product2Id', right_on='Id', suffixes=('_opp', '_prod'))

df_merged['CloseDate'] = pd.to_datetime(df_merged['CloseDate'])
df_merged = df_merged[(df_merged['CloseDate'].dt.year == 2021) & (df_merged['CloseDate'].dt.month == 6)]

for idx, row in df_merged.iterrows():
    print(f"Product ID: {row['Product2Id']}, Name: {row['Name']}, Desc: {row['Description']}")

opp_items = env['data_3']
